subject: CIR. NO. 400-Bus routes to be followed from 1st April 2026
body:

*        SRI SATHYA SAI VIDYA VIHAR*

0731-2553023
*CIR.NO.SSSVV/2025-26/400
          Date: 24th March 2026 *


Dear Parents



Sai Ram!



*We are pleased to share the bus routes to be followed from 1st April
2026.* The bus
routes have been attached herewith for your perusal. Kindly ensure the drop
and pick up of your ward from the designated stop on time.



*Please contact the Transport officer, Mr. Jitu Patel (Ph. 9826095139) for
any query.*



Looking forward to your cooperation.



With Best Regards





Dr. Anju Chopra

Principal

Email - principal@sathyasaiindore.com

Website - www.sathyasaiindore.com
